req.title: Immunization record (audit)
req.statement: A clinician shall record an Immunization with administered date not in the future. An AuditEvent must be emitted for every operation and tested end-to-end.

doc.reasoning: R-HLT-085 mandates three testable behaviours: (1) a clinician can POST an Immunization with a valid past/today date and receive 201 Created (positive / EP); (2) a clinician cannot POST an Immunization with a future date and receives 422 (negative / NEG); (3) the exact boundary of 'today' is accepted while 'today+1' is rejected (boundary / BVA). In addition, every operation must emit an AuditEvent, so each test also asserts that exactly one AuditEvent referencing the request exists. All tests are self-contained: they authenticate, POST, then verify the AuditEvent, and clean up. Placeholders <clinician_auth_headers>, <base_url>, <audit_events_for_request>, and <delete_resource> are used for shared infrastructure that would live in conftest.py.

tests.name: test_immunization_valid_past_date_accepted
actions: Construct Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime = today - 30 days
Capture response status, Location header, and resource id
Query AuditEvent endpoint filtering by entity reference to the new resource
expected: Exactly one AuditEvent exists referencing the created Immunization id
trace: R-HLT-085 – clinician records immunization with past date
R-HLT-085 – AuditEvent emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_valid_past_date_accepted():
    headers = <clinician_auth_headers>()
    base = <base_url>()
    occurrence = (date.today() - timedelta(days=30)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "COVID-19"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": occurrence
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "Immunization"
    assert body["occurrenceDateTime"] == occurrence
    resource_id = body["id"]
    audits = <audit_events_for_request>(resource_id, headers)
    assert len(audits) >= 1
    <delete_resource>(f"{base}/Immunization/{resource_id}", headers)

tests.name: test_immunization_future_date_rejected_422
actions: Construct Immunization payload with occurrenceDateTime = today + 1 day
Capture HTTP status and OperationOutcome body
Query AuditEvent endpoint to confirm an audit entry was still emitted for the rejected request
expected: Exactly one AuditEvent exists recording the failed POST attempt
trace: R-HLT-085 – error pathway: 422 when date > today
R-HLT-085 – AuditEvent emitted for every operation (including rejections)
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_future_date_rejected_422():
    headers = <clinician_auth_headers>()
    base = <base_url>()
    future_date = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "Influenza"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": future_date
    }
    resp = requests.post(
        f"{base}/Immunization",
        json=payload,
        headers=headers
    )
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert body["resourceType"] == "OperationOutcome"
    severities = [i["severity"] for i in body.get("issue", [])]
    assert "error" in severities
    request_id = resp.headers.get("X-Request-Id", "")
    audits = <audit_events_for_request>(request_id, headers, by_request=True)
    assert len(audits) >= 1

tests.name: test_immunization_boundary_today_accepted_tomorrow_rejected
actions: Assert HTTP 201 and store resource id
Verify AuditEvent emitted for both requests
expected: AuditEvent exists for both the successful and the failed operation
trace: R-HLT-085 – boundary: administered date == today is the last valid value
R-HLT-085 – boundary: administered date == today+1 is the first invalid value
R-HLT-085 – AuditEvent emitted for every operation
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import date, timedelta
import requests

def test_immunization_boundary_today_accepted_tomorrow_rejected():
    headers = <clinician_auth_headers>()
    base = <base_url>()
    today = date.today().isoformat()
    tomorrow = (date.today() + timedelta(days=1)).isoformat()
    ok_payload = {
        "resourceType": "Immunization",
        "status": "completed",
        "vaccineCode": {"text": "MMR"},
        "patient": {"reference": "Patient/test-patient-1"},
        "occurrenceDateTime": today
    }
    ok_resp = requests.post(f"{base}/Immunization", json=ok_payload, headers=headers)
    assert ok_resp.status_code == 201
    ok_id = ok_resp.json()["id"]
    ok_audits = <audit_events_for_request>(ok_id, headers)
    assert len(ok_audits) >= 1
    bad_payload = {**ok_payload, "occurrenceDateTime": tomorrow}
    bad_resp = requests.post(f"{base}/Immunization", json=bad_payload, headers=headers)
    assert bad_resp.status_code == 422
    req_id = bad_resp.headers.get("X-Request-Id", "")
    bad_audits = <audit_events_for_request>(req_id, headers, by_request=True)
    assert len(bad_audits) >= 1
    <delete_resource>(f"{base}/Immunization/{ok_id}", headers)
